hero.description: We transform raw sensor data into precision logistics. Faraday is more than a WMS – it is the operating system for your warehouse.

intro.title: Welcome to Faraday WMS
intro.description: The Faraday system is an intelligent warehouse management tool featuring automated stock allocation and real-time environmental monitoring.

quickTip.label: Quick Tip:
quickTip.text: The system automatically selects the best storage location based on temperature requirements and dimensions. No manual allocation needed.

addingProducts.title: Adding Products

steps.step1: Navigate to the Warehouse tab in your dashboard.
steps.step2: Click the Add Product button in the top-right corner.
steps.step3: Enter the barcode, dimensions, and specific temperature range requirements.

addingProducts.hint: Note: Each barcode must be unique within the global system database.

monitoring.title: Environmental Monitoring
monitoring.description: Faraday provides real-time telemetry for shelf temperature and weight load.

indicators.green: Green: All parameters are within safe limits.
indicators.red: Red: Threshold exceeded. Immediate intervention required.
